subject.description: A marketer in a plain t-shirt.
subject.action: Holding up a handwritten cardboard sign that reads 'WE ARE NOT NIKE'. Looking exasperated directly into the smartphone camera lens while standing in a cramped storage closet acting as an office.

setting.location: A chaotic, small supply closet filled with boxes and marketing materials, doubling as an office space.

composition.framing: Centered selfie framing. MUST follow cropping rules: perfect headspace above the hair, no cut flesh on the holding arm, ample breathing room for the chin.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Wide depth of field, realistic smartphone camera focus emphasizing the cramped space.

lighting.color_grading: Unedited iPhone photo, completely raw amateur look, 0 aesthetic effort.

aesthetic_style: RAW photo, unedited smartphone photo, authentic unretouched photography, hyper realistic photorealism, actual human beings. DO NOT MAKE IT A CARTOON OR DIGITAL ART.
negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: professional lighting, aesthetic filters, massive offices, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, digital art, illustration, vector art, cartoon, 3D render, CGI.
